name: Koa'ki Meiru Speeder
name_jp: コアキメイル・スピード
desc: During each of your End Phases, destroy this card unless you send 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" from your hand to the Graveyard or reveal 1 Machine-Type monster in your hand. If you draw "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" during your Draw Phase, you can reveal it to your opponent to draw 1 more card.
mnst_eff: During each of your End Phases, destroy this card unless you send 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" from your hand to the Graveyard or reveal 1 Machine-Type monster in your hand. If you draw "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" during your Draw Phase, you can reveal it to your opponent to draw 1 more card.
eff: During each of your End Phases, destroy this card unless you send 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" from your hand to the Graveyard or reveal 1 Machine-Type monster in your hand. If you draw "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" during your Draw Phase, you can reveal it to your opponent to draw 1 more card.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
